phrases.en: When it got late, Jenny yawned.
phrases.zh: 夜深了，珍妮打了个哈欠。

phrases.en: She said goodnight to her parents.
She went upstairs to her room.
phrases.zh: 她上楼回到自己的房间。

phrases.en: She hung some of her clothes up in the closet.
phrases.zh: 她把一些衣服挂进了衣柜。

phrases.en: And put her dirty clothes in the laundry basket.
phrases.zh: 并把脏衣服放进了洗衣篮。

phrases.en: After turning on her bedside lamp, she turned off the room light.
phrases.zh: 打开床头灯后，她关掉了房间的大灯。

phrases.en: And put it on her nightstand.
She read in bed for a while.
phrases.zh: 她在床上看了一会儿书。

phrases.en: Finally, she turned off the lamp.
